subject: Re: A few questions just in case please?
body: Thank you! Was amazing! The best family dinner ever. Louis said they LOVED me! Thu both texted him afterwards saying that:)

subject: Re: A few questions just in case please?
Re: A few questions just in case please?
body:
how will our future differ from your lives? if i was going to do your job what three things would i have to know.? is obama good for the country,.? israel? if you could live one day of your lives over again, what would it be?
